ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "story_line" TEXT /* Description or storyline of the content */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is currently active */,
  "created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content was created */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform where the content is available */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Movie, TV Show, Live Event) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the content */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "cast" TEXT /* List of main cast members */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the content */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the trailer video */,
  "closed_caption" INTEGER /* Indicates if closed captions are available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "subscription_fee" REAL /* Monthly subscription fee for the platform */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was launched */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the platform is primarily available */,
  "supported_devices" TEXT /* List of devices supported by the platform */,
  "content_count" INTEGER /* Total number of content available on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the genre was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_genres" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre assigned to the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "live_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each live event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the live event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Sports, Concert) */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the live event */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the event */,
  "live_stream_url" TEXT /* URL to the live stream */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Content Creator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership record */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being viewed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the views were recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the views were recorded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Average session duration in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_stats_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the content after the update */,
  "rollback_possible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the update can be rolled back */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("id")
)
